calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-21-2005 Continued To Sep-26-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-26-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prov-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Arnold W. Evje II, Esq. for Plaintiff: N. R. Patel, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendants: Ray Williams and Dorothy Williams.
Exhibit 1 - Three-day notice-------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 106 Sixth Street, #401, San Francisco.
Back Rent and Damages of $1,264.24
Costs $151.30.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit in open court
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-26-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: ARNOLD EVJE FOR PLAINTIFF N.R. PATEL
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT RAY WILLIAMS OR DOROTHY WILLIAMS

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. JURY DEMAND STRICKEN. TO PROCEED AS COURT TRIAL.

COMMISSIONER:SUE KAPLAN; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED (218)
